calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-18-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-18-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Pandita S. Toy.
Dept: 514. Judge: Harold E. Kahn. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR #11185. Telephone: 415-551-0334. Email: adelgado@sftc.org.

West Imoboden, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Citibank, N.A.
Martin Kokoska, Assistant Vice President for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Pandita S. Toy.
Plaintiff's complaint for Common Counts was filed August 10, 2018.
Defendant Pandita S. Toy's answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on October 30, 2018.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on April 5, 2019, setting trial for August 26, 2019.
Joint Stipulation to Continue the Trial Date was filed August 23, 2019.
Order continuing trial date to November 18, 2019 was filed August 26, 2019.
Notice of New Trial Date was served on defendant Pandita S. Toy on September 18, 2019.
No DOE defendants.

Plaintiff Citibank, N.A. submits the following exhibit for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Montly statements to defendant from 6/24/10 to 5/24/17.....................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Citibank, N.A., and against defendant Pandita S. Toy, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $11,483.33.
Costs - $435.00.
Total - $11,918.33.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibit.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-26-2019 Continued To Nov-18-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2019 Set For Trial On Aug-26-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
